untranslatable_reason: This is an option pricing/valuation methodology (fair value calculation using volatility-based model), not a position sizing rule. It describes HOW to price options for evaluation, not HOW MUCH to risk or what fraction of capital to deploy. The entry conditions describe a price iteration process for fair value discovery, not position sizing allocation. Category label 'SIZING' is mislabeled—this belongs in VALUATION/ENTRY_FILTER.
